title: APEX Iteration Log
description: Shape of agent-output/{project}/08-iteration-log.json — per-step iteration records appended by the orchestrator. Read by tools/scripts/benchmark-e2e.mjs (scoreTimingPerformance, scoreRegenerationRate).

step.description: Workflow step number (1..7) or '3_5' for the Governance sub-step.

artifact_retries.description: Per-artifact retry counts. Keys are artifact filenames produced in this iteration; values are integers >= 0 counting how many times the artifact was regenerated before acceptance. Consumed by tools/scripts/benchmark-e2e.mjs scoreRegenerationRate() and aggregated for the regen-rate baseline (T-012). Added by T-011 (Draw.io Diagram Quality Uplift plan).

artifact_friction.description: Per-artifact friction-event counts (out-of-band signal complementing artifact_retries). Counts: failed/erroring MCP calls collapsed by causal chain, redundant successful MCP calls (e.g., preview + final finish-diagram), and out-of-band file-level corrections (sed/manual edit on saved artifact). Consumed by scoreRegenerationRate() to form the cost composite (retries + friction). Added by T-012 capture (option C).
